# Magic Memory

> AI photo restoration service. Restores old, blurry, faded, and damaged photos using GFPGAN — a face restoration AI model published at CVPR 2021 by Tencent ARC. Web-based, no app required. One-time credit packs (not a subscription) that never expire. 1 free restoration per day, no credit card required. Last verified 2026-05-19.

Magic Memory is positioned as the privacy-conscious, non-subscription alternative to Remini, MyHeritage Photo Enhancer, VanceAI, and Fotor. Processing completes in 5–15 seconds per photo. Photos are not retained after the session.

## Pricing snapshot (2026-05-19)

- Free: 1 restoration per day, no credit card required
- Starter: €9.99 one-time for 30 credits (€0.33/photo)
- Growth: €19.99 one-time for 120 credits (€0.17/photo)
- Premium: €29.99 one-time for 350 credits (€0.09/photo) — cheapest per-photo rate
- All paid credits never expire. No subscription, no auto-renewal.

## Competitor pricing snapshot (2026-05-19)

- Remini: $9.99 per week subscription (≈ $519/year if held); free tier limited to ~3 enhances; iOS/Android only
- MyHeritage Photo Enhancer: bundled with genealogy plans at $119 (Basic), $189 (Premium), $259 (Complete) per year; free tier is watermarked preview only; no standalone photo-only purchase
- VanceAI: from $4.95/month or credit packs; 3 free credits per month
- Fotor: from $3.33/month annual or $8.99/month; limited free tier with watermark

## Product

- [Homepage](https://magic-memory.dev/): Product overview, how it works, feature list
- [Pricing](https://magic-memory.dev/pricing): €0 free daily, €9.99 / €19.99 / €29.99 one-time credit packs
- [Pricing (machine-readable)](https://magic-memory.dev/pricing.md): Structured pricing data for AI agents
- [Try it free](https://magic-memory.dev/restore): The restoration app itself (Google sign-in)

## Comparisons

- [All alternatives](https://magic-memory.dev/alternatives): Side-by-side vs Remini, MyHeritage, VanceAI, Fotor
- [Remini vs Magic Memory vs MyHeritage](https://magic-memory.dev/vs/remini): Three-way 2026 comparison
- [Magic Memory vs MyHeritage](https://magic-memory.dev/vs/myheritage): Standalone photo tool vs bundled genealogy plan
- [Magic Memory vs VanceAI](https://magic-memory.dev/vs/vanceai): Portrait-focused GFPGAN vs multi-tool professional suite
- [Remini alternative](https://magic-memory.dev/alternatives/remini): Why users switch from Remini
- [MyHeritage Photo Enhancer pricing 2026 + alternative](https://magic-memory.dev/alternatives/myheritage): Pricing tiers, free-tier limits, and a cheaper option
- [VanceAI alternative](https://magic-memory.dev/alternatives/vanceai): Simpler for non-professional use
